# Software {.unnumbered}

Examples were calculated in R version 4.5.3 (2026-03-11) with an effort to use the most recent versions of R packages.

The codes load silently only a few packages:


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
theme_set(theme_light())
```
:::


All other packages are named before the function as in `forecast::ggAcf()` (this code calls the function `ggAcf()` from the package `forecast`) or called immediately before the necessary function use:


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
library(fable)
m <- as_tsibble(Y) %>%
    model(ARIMA(Y ~ 1, ic = "bic"))
report(m)
```
:::


The R packages used in this book include (in alphabetic order):


::: {.cell}

:::


* `astsa` [@R-astsa]
* `downlit` [@R-downlit]
* `dplR` [@R-dplR]
* `dplyr` [@R-dplyr]
* `dynlm` [@R-dynlm]
* `Ecdat` [@R-Ecdat]
* `fable` [@R-fable]
* `feasts` [@R-feasts]
* `fGarch` [@R-fGarch]
* `FinTS` [@R-FinTS]
* `fma` [@R-fma]
* `forecast` [@R-forecast]
* `funtimes` [@R-funtimes]
* `gamlss` [@R-gamlss]
* `gamlss.ggplots` [@R-gamlss.ggplots]
* `gamlss.util` [@R-gamlss.util]
* `GGally` [@R-GGally]
* `ggplot2` [@R-ggplot2]
* `ggpubr` [@R-ggpubr]
* `Kendall` [@R-Kendall]
* `knitr` [@R-knitr]
* `lawstat` [@R-lawstat]
* `lmtest` [@R-lmtest]
* `lomb` [@R-lomb]
* `mgcv` [@R-mgcv]
* `mgcViz` [@R-mgcViz]
* `nlme` [@R-nlme]
* `oce` [@R-oce]
* `patchwork` [@R-patchwork]
* `plotly` [@R-plotly]
* `pracma` [@R-pracma]
* `randtests` [@R-randtests]
* `readr` [@R-readr]
* `rmarkdown` [@R-rmarkdown]
* `signal` [@R-signal]
